periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 3am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 75. South wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Tuesday
periods.short_forecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 91. Heat index values as high as 103. Southwest wind 10 to 16 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

periods.name: Tuesday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 10pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 4am, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 77. Heat index values as high as 100. Southwest wind 15 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 87. Southwest wind 13 to 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.
